creator: dk@farm.org
text:
I am adding more patches for nntpbtr port.
	Each patch contains author and short description of the problem
	it fixes. 
	All patches are tested by me in production on 2 news servers.
	Most are also confirmed with program author, Leonid Yegoshin.

Fix: note: these patches are all new and should not create any conflicts
	when imported.
